name: Skinny Bathroom Cart Black - Brightroom™
description:
Keep your bath essentials organized and within reach with the Skinny Bathroom Cart from Brightroom™. This black cart is designed with multiple open shelves for easy access to the items. Made with a metal frame, this cart has a wooden top shelf for a mixed-material touch, and it comes with castor wheels for easy movement around the space.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
